projects.name: specorator
projects.description: Your development cockpit inside Obsidian. Guides anyone — developer, PM, designer, or founder — through a structured 12-stage Agentic Development Lifecycle. Claude Code agents handle spec drafting, task generation, and quality gates. You decide at every stage; all artifacts stay in your vault as plain Markdown.

projects.name: specorator-runtime
projects.description: The planned orchestration bridge that connects specorator's UI to the agent and workflow subsystems. Once live, it enables real-time agent sessions, task queuing, and event streaming across the full ecosystem.

projects.name: agentonomous
projects.description: TypeScript library providing six specialized agent roles — PM, Architect, Engineering, QA, Review, and Writer — each responsible for distinct stages of the Agentic Development Lifecycle. The foundation that powers specorator's AI coworker features in v2.0.

projects.name: agentic-workflow
projects.description: The 12-stage Agentic Development Lifecycle (Idea → Research → Requirements → Design → Specification → Tasks → Implementation → Test Planning → Testing → Review → Release → Retrospective) with templates, quality gates, and Claude Code agents. Use it standalone via CLI or as the engine powering specorator.
